历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28664 → 31907 → 32124 → 28518 → 33042, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 33042, with a cumulative backward shift of about 900 positions over the past 3 years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 50 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 52, a 30% expansion compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and changing the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was some negative public opinion (related to school management), but no significant negative signals were seen in the 2026 reputation data. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with short video exposure at a medium level and no viral events. No record of enrollment gaps. Food Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), and Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, with two flagship disciplines leading nationally, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Hot engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Guangdong candidates. The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Guangdong Province expands from 40 in 2025 to 52 in 2026, a significant increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33042, the significant 30% enrollment expansion in 2026 (with the ranking shifting backward to about 38990 based on supply-demand elasticity), the 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 39190, notably lower than 2025; the range is 38690–39690.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 38690–39690, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Food Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 traditional engineering majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 38600) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; those with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 39600) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
